name: in-memory-resource-service
summary: A transient, in-memory REST service managing multiple resource collections (Users, Organizations, Bears, Office Tables, Buildings, Cars, Bicycles) with system-generated identifiers, per-resource domain validation, and no persistence across process restarts.

modules.name: user-management
modules.summary: Manages User resources: create and full-replace operations with system-generated UUID identifiers, name/email validation, and email uniqueness enforced in an in-memory store.

modules.name: organization-management
modules.summary: Manages Organization resources with system-generated UUID identifiers, name/slug validation, and slug uniqueness enforced in an in-memory store.

modules.name: bear-crud
modules.summary: Manages Bear resources with full CRUD, UUIDv7 identifiers, name/age/colour validation, unique-name enforcement, and cursor-based pagination backed by in-memory storage.

modules.name: office-table-management
modules.summary: Manages Office Table resources with full CRUD, UUIDv7 identifiers, non-negative price validation, fixed id/price/date-bought representation, full-replacement updates, direct JSON payloads, and cursor-based pagination over an in-memory store.

modules.name: infrastructure
modules.summary: Technical infrastructure and cross-cutting concerns: Express application wiring, HTTP transport bootstrapping, global error handling, shared domain error types, and project build/deployment metadata.
